subprocess/BELOW_NORMAL_PRIORITY_CLASS.name: BELOW_NORMAL_PRIORITY_CLASS
subprocess/BELOW_NORMAL_PRIORITY_CLASS.description: A Popen creationflags parameter to specify that a new process will have a below average priority. Added in version 3.7.
